programme.title: Le négociateur

programme.title: Le négociateur
programme.desc: Championnats de France de gymnastique dans un gymnase; une femme surgit et prend en otage l'entraîneur et les filles de l'équipe; elle affirme que sa fille n'a pas pu se suicider et que l'enquête a été bâclée.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Après s'être exprimé dans la presse, Hondo décide de prendre du recul; il se retire dans une ville tranquille du Mexique pour faire le point sur sa vie et sa carrière; malgré lui, il se retrouve impliqué dans le combat d'une famille pour la justice.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.

programme.desc: Murdoch soupçonne une collègue d'être impliquée dans une affaire de meurtre; Julia flirte avec le danger à London, en Ontario; Watts et le détective Edwards enquêtent sur une série de vols de tableaux; à son retour à Toronto, Crabtree est enlevé.

programme.title: Les enquêtes de Murdoch
programme.desc: Murdoch est convaincu que Violet Hart est impliquée dans un meurtre; cette dernière fait pression sur Murdoch pour qu'il abandonne les poursuites contre elle; Crabtree est toujours retenu en otage; l'avenir de Watts comme détective est compromis.

programme.title: Les dieux d'Égypte
programme.desc: Dans une époque ancestrale, la paix règne en Égypte. Mais Seth, qui convoite le pouvoir, assassine le roi et condamne Horus à l'exil, plongeant le royaume d'Égypte dans le chaos. C'est l'intervention d'un voleur qui va sortir Horus de sa prison.

programme.title: Disparus à tout jamais
programme.desc: La disparition de Tamra, cinq ans, fait écho au scandale des pensionnats autochtones; les enquêteurs explorent toutes les pistes et les indices continuent à affluer; un mystérieux message est affiché sur Internet.

programme.title: Turner et Hooch
programme.desc: Turner propose les talents de pisteur de Hooch pour traquer un célèbre voleur de bijoux; Hooch conduit toutefois l'équipe dans une animalerie, où il vole un jouet; ce chien indiscipliné pourrait-il être plus doué pour le pistage qu'il n'y paraît?

programme.title: Superman et Loïs
programme.desc: Traumatisé d'avoir échoué, Jordan se renferme sur lui-même; Jonathan découvre qu'il a des pouvoirs; Sam Lane recrute John Henry et Natalie au Département de la Défense; il élabore également un plan.

programme.title: Rapides et dangereux 2
programme.desc: Deux coureurs automobiles casse-cou sont recrutés par le FBI pour infiltrer l'entourage d'un dangereux criminel.

programme.title: Rapides et dangereux 3
programme.desc: Au Japon, un Américain qui s'adonne à la course de rue en apprend une variante excitante, mais dangereuse, et décide de se mesurer au champion local.

programme.title: Crinqué sous haute tension
programme.desc: Chelios fera face à un gangster chinois qui lui a volé son coeur pratiquement indestructible et qui l'a remplacé par un coeur artificiel alimenté par des batteries qui requiert des chocs réguliers d'électricité pour continuer à fonctionner.

programme.title: Unité des personnes disparues
programme.desc: Une dramaturge de renom s'est fait enlever avant la grande réouverture d'un théâtre. L'unité découvre que la victime et son partenaire avaient reçu une vidéo de menaces. Pendant ce temps, Jason demande à Wayne de retrouver le père du bébé de Sidney.

programme.title: La justicière
programme.desc: L'escapade romantique de McCall et Dante est interrompue par les hommes forts de Salazar; Dee rencontre son autrice préférée, qui lui prodigue des conseils; Vi acceptera-t-elle de franchir une nouvelle étape dans sa relation avec le capitaine Curtis?

programme.title: G.I. Joe: les représailles
programme.desc: Les survivants d'un commando d'élite décimé dans une attaque meurtrière se liguent pour contrer les plans de domination du monde.

programme.title: Triple 9
programme.desc: Contrôlée par la mafia russe, une bande de policiers américains corrompus se voit forcée d'accomplir un braquage de banque très audacieux. Pour y parvenir, les malfaiteurs veulent tuer un des leurs à l'autre bout de la ville pour créer une diversion.

programme.title: Durham
programme.desc: Depuis que Mike s'acharne à retrouver la piste d'un tueur en série, l'angoisse infeste son quotidien. Le policier se sent menacé.

programme.title: Durham
programme.desc: Mike enquête sur son voisin, Ray Prager, qu'il soupçonne de plusieurs crimes.

programme.title: Durham
programme.desc: Mike Sweeney éprouve de plus en plus de mal à conserver son douloureux secret.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent's annual trip to exotic locales stirs jealousy; Oscar experiments with e-mail.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey wants to start a running club; Hank's new crossing guard job.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash treats a man with a rare medical condition; Mags gets a visit from her parents, and goes above and beyond for a pregnant woman with an undiagnosed condition; a misunderstanding with a rabies patient lands Theo in trouble.

programme.title: Good Wife's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Kate must find her husband's killer in order to clear her own name.

programme.title: Independence Day-saster
programme.desc: After an alien invasion disables conventional military forces, a man and a renegade scientist must find their weaknesses and defeat them.

programme.title: H.appiness
programme.desc: An app designed to bring its users happiness helps a man build the perfect life, which he ends up destroying when he learns the app is faulty.

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service
programme.desc: Agent 007 (George Lazenby) proposes to a contessa (Diana Rigg) and foils SPECTRE chief Blofeld's (Telly Savalas) agricultural plot.

programme.title: GoldenEye
programme.desc: A secret weapon's theft sends Agent 007 to Russia, where a pretty computer programmer helps him track an ex-cohort believed dead.

programme.title: Storm Cell
programme.desc: A storm chaser battles personal demons while trying to save unsuspecting people from deadly weather.

programme.title: A Haunting in Venice
programme.desc: Now retired and living in self-imposed exile in the world's most glamorous city, Poirot reluctantly attends a seance at a decaying, haunted palazzo. He soon gets thrust into a sinister world of shadows and secrets when one of the guests is murdered.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 2
programme.desc: Sonic and his sidekick, Tails, embark on a journey to find a mystical emerald that has the power to destroy civilizations.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: When their late police captain gets linked to drug cartels, wisecracking Miami cops Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett embark on a dangerous mission to clear his name.

programme.title: Hurry Up Tomorrow
programme.desc: Plagued by insomnia, a musician gets pulled into a nightmarish odyssey with a stranger who begins to unravel the very core of his existence.

programme.title: Self Driver
programme.desc: Facing mounting expenses and the unrelenting pressure of modern living, a down-on-his-luck cab driver is lured by a mysterious new app that promises fast, easy money.

programme.title: Mongrels
programme.desc: In rural Canada in the 1990s, a Korean family, a widower, his teenage son, and young daughter, attempts to find footing in a new land while navigating the dark forests of grief.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: Government researchers try to re-create the 1943

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Real Murders
programme.desc: Master sleuth Aurora Teagarden (Candace Cameron Bure) must find a copycat killer who targets members of a crime-buff club.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: The Julius House
programme.desc: Aurora Teagarden finds her dream home, unaware of its strange history. Just as she's ready to move in, she discovers that its previous owners disappeared without a trace.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: The hard-won success of their predecessors enables stars like Shania Twain, Macy Gray and Sarah McLachlan to overcome obstacles and reach new heights; a glimpse of the new generation: Taylor Swift, St. Vincent, Syd, Billie Eilish, Yola and more.

programme.title: The Dark Knight Rises
programme.desc: Eight years after he took the blame for Harvey Dent's death and vanished into the night, Batman is forced out of his self-imposed exile by a cunning cat burglar and a merciless terrorist called Bane.

programme.title: I Am Raquel Welch
programme.desc: Celebrating the life of a trailblazing actress and single mother who not only redefined the world's idea of a Hollywood sex symbol, but also led the way for modern-day action heroines.

programme.title: Swarmed
programme.desc: Deadly wasps threaten a small town after a scientist (Michael Shanks) accidentally releases them.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Reclusive author Loretta Sage goes on tour to promote her new adventure novel with handsome cover model Alan. When Loretta gets kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire who's looking for a lost treasure, Alan tries to become a real hero and rescue her.

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: A sorority queen (Reese Witherspoon) enrolls in Harvard to prove to her former boyfriend that she has more than good looks.

programme.title: I Wish You All the Best
programme.desc: A high school junior comes out as nonbinary and is thrown out of their family's home. After enrolling in a new school, they find support from an eccentric art teacher while forming an unexpected bond with a kindhearted student.

programme.title: Bonjour tristesse
programme.desc: At the height of summer, 18-year-old Cécile is relaxing by the French seaside with her father and falling in love with her new boyfriend. However, the arrival of her late mother's enigmatic friend soon turns her world upside down.

programme.title: Humane
programme.desc: A global environmental collapse forces world leaders to take extreme measures to reduce Earth's population.

programme.title: Triangle of Sadness
programme.desc: Two models and a cleaning lady become stranded on a desert island with a group of billionaires.

programme.title: Deadly Estate
programme.desc: When a hotel manager is wrongly accused of killing the soon-to-be new owner's son, she must use her hospitality skills to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Snowmageddon
programme.desc: An Alaskan town faces destruction after a family finds on the doorstep a snow globe that affects the real world.

programme.title: Undercover Grandpa
programme.desc: A shy young man turns to his grandfather and his grandfather's old war buddies to help him rescue the woman of his dreams from kidnappers.

programme.title: Whale
programme.desc: A young boy is sent to live with his grandparents in a remote indigenous community.

programme.title: Polar Storm
programme.desc: A scientist must save the day when violent storms threaten Earth's magnetic poles.

programme.title: Metal Tornado
programme.desc: A research team's experiments with solar energy accidentally create massive magnetic vortexes that destroy everything in their path.

programme.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
programme.desc: Mario and Luigi go on a whirlwind adventure through Mushroom Kingdom, uniting with a cast of familiar characters to defeat Bowser.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark, high school student Peter Parker starts to embrace his newfound identity as Spider-Man to battle the evil Vulture.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Bitten by a radioactive spider, teenager Miles Morales suddenly develops mysterious powers that transform him into Spider-Man. He must now use his newfound skills to battle the evil Kingpin, a hulking madman who can open portals to other universes.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: When Peter Parker asks for help from Doctor Strange, the stakes become even more dangerous, forcing him to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
programme.desc: When New York City comes under attack from an alien invasion, a woman and other survivors try to find a way to safety. They soon learn that they must remain absolutely silent as the mysterious creatures are drawn to the slightest sound.

programme.title: Golda
programme.desc: During the Yom Kippur War in 1973, Israeli Prime Minister Golda Meir must navigate overwhelming odds, a skeptical cabinet, and a complex relationship with U.S. Secretary of State Henry Kissinger as millions of lives hang in the balance.

programme.title: Dog
programme.desc: With a dog named Lulu by his side, Army Ranger Briggs races down the Pacific Coast to make it to a soldier's funeral on time. Along the way, Briggs and Lulu drive each other completely crazy, break a handful of laws and narrowly evade death.

programme.title: Dumb Money
programme.desc: Everyday people flip the script on Wall Street and get rich by turning GameStop into one of the world's hottest companies. In the middle of everything is Keith Gill, a regular guy who starts it all by sinking his life savings into the stock.

programme.title: Wildhood
programme.desc: When Link discovers his Mi'kmaw mother could still be alive, it lights a flame as he searches for a better life with his half brother. As the boys journey across Mi'kma'ki, Link finds community, identity and love in the land where he belongs.

programme.title: Dress for Success
programme.desc: A refugee turned fashionista lawyer launches her own brand of designer philanthropy.

programme.title: Pie to Die For: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: When Hannah's customer and Delores' theater rival is murdered, Hannah must find her killer in order to save her mother's reputation. Chad and Hannah's romance blossoms.

programme.title: Gunda
programme.desc: Filmmaker Victor Kossakovsky captures natural images of cows, chickens, and a pig and its litter.

programme.title: Selena + Chef
programme.desc: James Beard nominee Richard Blais is on a mission to make a very special birthday a smashing success; with Selena's little sister Gracie acting as her sous-chef, it's time to tackle nachos and ice cream sundaes.

programme.title: Storm Cell
programme.desc: A storm chaser battles personal demons while trying to save unsuspecting people from deadly weather.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: Pete

programme.title: Stonehenge Apocalypse
programme.desc: Archaeologists digging near Stonehenge accidentally activate an ancient piece of machinery underneath the bedrock that could end the world.

programme.title: Air Bud: World Pup
programme.desc: The golden retriever helps his young owner (Kevin Zegers) and his coed soccer team to shine while outsmarting a wily dogcatcher.

programme.title: IF
programme.desc: After discovering she can see everyone's imaginary friends, a girl embarks on a magical adventure to reconnect forgotten IFs with their kids.

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie
programme.desc: SpongeBob (Tom Kenny) and Patrick (Bill Fagerbakke) head for Shell City to retrieve King Neptune's stolen crown and save the life of Mr. Krabs (Clancy Brown).

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: While King struggles to cope with her sister's newfound independence, patients and staff are put on edge by an unexpected presence in the ER.

programme.title: The Trades
programme.desc: Refinery employees balance the conflicting personalities of a small town with the antics of a stressful workplace.

programme.title: The Trades
programme.desc: Refinery employees balance the conflicting personalities of a small town with the antics of a stressful workplace.

programme.title: Hell of a Summer
programme.desc: Camp counselor Jason Hochberg thinks his biggest problem is feeling out of touch with his teenage co-workers. What he doesn't know is that a mysterious masked killer is lurking on the campgrounds, brutally picking off victims one by one.

programme.title: Borat Subsequent Moviefilm
programme.desc: Released from prison for bringing shame to his country, Kazakh funnyman Borat risks life and limb when he returns to America with his 15-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Beyond Loch Ness
programme.desc: Years after the famous beast killed his father, James, a cryptozoologist, tracks the creature to Lake Superior and makes plans to kill it.

programme.title: Hurry Up Tomorrow
programme.desc: Plagued by insomnia, a musician gets pulled into a nightmarish odyssey with a stranger who begins to unravel the very core of his existence.

programme.title: Kalinga (Care)
programme.desc: The stories of several Filipina caregivers and nannies in Vancouver, that bear witness to their sacrifices as they struggle to reunite with their children and families.

programme.title: Nelly Knows Mysteries: A Fatal Engagement
programme.desc: When Dahlia's boyfriend is found dead, advice columnist Nelly joins Detective Hogan to help find the killer. However, as suspicions creep in, Dahlia becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Storm Cell
programme.desc: A storm chaser battles personal demons while trying to save unsuspecting people from deadly weather.

programme.desc: A sorority queen (Reese Witherspoon) enrolls in Harvard to prove to her former boyfriend that she has more than good looks.

programme.title: I Wish You All the Best
programme.desc: A high school junior comes out as nonbinary and is thrown out of their family's home. After enrolling in a new school, they find support from an eccentric art teacher while forming an unexpected bond with a kindhearted student.

programme.title: Bonjour tristesse
programme.desc: At the height of summer, 18-year-old Cécile is relaxing by the French seaside with her father and falling in love with her new boyfriend. However, the arrival of her late mother's enigmatic friend soon turns her world upside down.

programme.title: Humane
programme.desc: A global environmental collapse forces world leaders to take extreme measures to reduce Earth's population.

programme.title: Triangle of Sadness
programme.desc: Two models and a cleaning lady become stranded on a desert island with a group of billionaires.

programme.title: Triangle of Sadness
programme.desc: Two models and a cleaning lady become stranded on a desert island with a group of billionaires.

programme.title: Deadly Estate
programme.desc: When a hotel manager is wrongly accused of killing the soon-to-be new owner's son, she must use her hospitality skills to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Snowmageddon
programme.desc: An Alaskan town faces destruction after a family finds on the doorstep a snow globe that affects the real world.

programme.title: Undercover Grandpa
programme.desc: A shy young man turns to his grandfather and his grandfather's old war buddies to help him rescue the woman of his dreams from kidnappers.

programme.title: Whale
programme.desc: A young boy is sent to live with his grandparents in a remote indigenous community.

programme.title: Polar Storm
programme.desc: A scientist must save the day when violent storms threaten Earth's magnetic poles.

programme.title: Metal Tornado
programme.desc: A research team's experiments with solar energy accidentally create massive magnetic vortexes that destroy everything in their path.

programme.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
programme.desc: Mario and Luigi go on a whirlwind adventure through Mushroom Kingdom, uniting with a cast of familiar characters to defeat Bowser.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark, high school student Peter Parker starts to embrace his newfound identity as Spider-Man to battle the evil Vulture.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Bitten by a radioactive spider, teenager Miles Morales suddenly develops mysterious powers that transform him into Spider-Man. He must now use his newfound skills to battle the evil Kingpin, a hulking madman who can open portals to other universes.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: When Peter Parker asks for help from Doctor Strange, the stakes become even more dangerous, forcing him to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
programme.desc: When New York City comes under attack from an alien invasion, a woman and other survivors try to find a way to safety. They soon learn that they must remain absolutely silent as the mysterious creatures are drawn to the slightest sound.

programme.title: Golda
programme.desc: During the Yom Kippur War in 1973, Israeli Prime Minister Golda Meir must navigate overwhelming odds, a skeptical cabinet, and a complex relationship with U.S. Secretary of State Henry Kissinger as millions of lives hang in the balance.

programme.title: Dog
programme.desc: With a dog named Lulu by his side, Army Ranger Briggs races down the Pacific Coast to make it to a soldier's funeral on time. Along the way, Briggs and Lulu drive each other completely crazy, break a handful of laws and narrowly evade death.

programme.title: Dumb Money
programme.desc: Everyday people flip the script on Wall Street and get rich by turning GameStop into one of the world's hottest companies. In the middle of everything is Keith Gill, a regular guy who starts it all by sinking his life savings into the stock.

programme.title: Dumb Money
programme.desc: Everyday people flip the script on Wall Street and get rich by turning GameStop into one of the world's hottest companies. In the middle of everything is Keith Gill, a regular guy who starts it all by sinking his life savings into the stock.

programme.title: Wildhood
programme.desc: When Link discovers his Mi'kmaw mother could still be alive, it lights a flame as he searches for a better life with his half brother. As the boys journey across Mi'kma'ki, Link finds community, identity and love in the land where he belongs.

programme.title: Dress for Success
programme.desc: A refugee turned fashionista lawyer launches her own brand of designer philanthropy.

programme.title: Pie to Die For: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: When Hannah's customer and Delores' theater rival is murdered, Hannah must find her killer in order to save her mother's reputation. Chad and Hannah's romance blossoms.

programme.title: Gunda
programme.desc: Filmmaker Victor Kossakovsky captures natural images of cows, chickens, and a pig and its litter.

programme.title: Selena + Chef
programme.desc: James Beard nominee Richard Blais is on a mission to make a very special birthday a smashing success; with Selena's little sister Gracie acting as her sous-chef, it's time to tackle nachos and ice cream sundaes.

programme.title: Storm Cell
programme.desc: A storm chaser battles personal demons while trying to save unsuspecting people from deadly weather.

programme.title: Stonehenge Apocalypse
programme.desc: Archaeologists digging near Stonehenge accidentally activate an ancient piece of machinery underneath the bedrock that could end the world.

programme.desc: The golden retriever helps his young owner (Kevin Zegers) and his coed soccer team to shine while outsmarting a wily dogcatcher.

programme.title: IF
programme.desc: After discovering she can see everyone's imaginary friends, a girl embarks on a magical adventure to reconnect forgotten IFs with their kids.

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie

programme.desc: Archaeologist Jones (Harrison Ford) rescues his kidnapped father (Sean Connery), and the two race the Nazis to find the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Indy (Harrison Ford) and a young adventurer (Shia La Beouf) must ferret out a powerful artifact and keep it out of the hands of a deadly Soviet agent (Cate Blanchett).

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny
programme.desc: Daredevil archaeologist Indiana Jones races against time to retrieve a legendary dial that can change the course of history. Accompanied by his goddaughter, he soon finds himself squaring off against Jürgen Voller, a former Nazi who works for NASA.

programme.desc: Newt Scamander is enlisted by Hogwarts Professor Albus Dumbledore to battle dark wizard Gellert Grindelwald, whose plan to rule over non-magical beings threatens to divide the wizarding world.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Secrets of Dumbledore
programme.desc: Professor Albus Dumbledore must assist Newt Scamander and his partners as Grindelwald begins to lead an army to eliminate all Muggles.

programme.title: Night at the Museum
programme.desc: A night watchman (Ben Stiller) at a museum of natural history discovers that exhibits come alive after the building closes.

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Battle of the Smithsonian
programme.desc: Larry Daley (Ben Stiller) joins forces with Teddy Roosevelt (Robin Williams), Amelia Earhart (Amy Adams) and others to prevent four of history's worst villains from conquering the world.

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Secret of the Tomb
programme.desc: Upon learning that the museum's magic is disappearing, night watchman Larry Daley (Ben Stiller) sets out on an epic quest to the British Museum in London to save his friends one last time.

programme.title: Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: In 2029 an astronaut (Mark Wahlberg) leads a human uprising against a military leader (Tim Roth) and his army of ruling simians.

programme.title: Dawn of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Human survivors of a plague threaten Caesar's growing nation of genetically evolved apes. Though they reach a fragile peace, soon both sides are brought to the brink of a war that will determine which will become Earth's dominant species.

programme.title: Rise of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: A scientist's quest to find a cure for Alzheimer's disease unintentionally results in a highly intelligent chimpanzee, which may signal the end of man's dominion over Earth.

programme.title: Star Trek: Lower Decks
programme.desc: The crew has trouble bonding with Ensign Jet Manhaver, who has been assigned Boimler's bunk and shift duties; Boimler's life on the U.S.S. Titan is more intense than he thought it would be.

programme.title: Mighty Trains
programme.desc: Exploring Vietnam by rail aboard the Reunification Express; a three-day ride from Hanoi to Ho Chi Minh City rich in views of rivers, rice paddies and dragon fruit orchards; steeped in the nation's war-torn past.

programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri make recipes sent by Triple D alums, who join them via video chat; fish tacos out of San Francisco; a Cajun shrimp creation coming from Des Moines; spicy Thai straight out of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Lahaina, Hawaii, the Fieri family revisits a funky noodle joint; in Chicago, an Italian eatery cranks out calamari and a Korean-American burger joint goes crazy with kimchi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's cruising around Cali, and his first stop is a favorite from the pilot episode that's still slayin' with a killer prime rib sandwich; he grabs sandwiches in Eagle Rock and finds a chef from Yucatan branching out with his Mexican menu.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Pacifica, Calif., Guy Fieri revisits an old barbecue buddy to check out his take on pork ribs and a new spin on an old standby; a neighborhood joint in Boulder, Colo., is still a favorite breakfast spot for the college crowd.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri revisits an old favorite he's been going to for years in San Francisco, but nowadays it's his buddy who's on the line serving up cod rillettes and chowder with a surprise ingredient.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is heading to San Francisco for Ethiopian-style flank steak and sauteed prawns; in Minneapolis, an Italian joint is still scratch-making their pasta and prosciutto; a Duluth diner is gathering ingredients straight from their planters.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In the Florida Keys, Guy and Hunter are hittin' up a local landmark for deconstructed ceviche, and in Philly, classic comfort food is made with unexpected ingredients.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checking out a mix of familiar places and new faces; in Miami, Guy and a couple buddies hit up a Haitian place for the first time; in Oakland, he finds a vegan version of Creole classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cruises the neighborhood to revisit local hangouts, starting in San Francisco, where an Italian joint keeps crankin' out favorites like chicken marsala; in Philadelphia, an old-school diner is still offering up scrapple and French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Kihei, Hawaii, Guy, Hunter and Jules stumble onto a pizza cart that Guy first found on the beach in 2016; in Cloquet, Minn., an old-school carhop's delivering double cheeseburgers and real-deal Coneys right to your car.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri drives coast to coast as he explores America's intriguing restaurants and samples classic road food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going globe-trotting for gangster grub while staying stateside; he's getting a taste of lights-out lasagna Bolognese in Naples, FL.; a fresh take on shrimp and grits in Tallahassee, FL.; the bomb-braised chashu pork buns in Chicago.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's heading back for some global grub, starting with Thai in Phoenix, Ariz.; a Syracuse, N.Y., spot is still serving up legit Lebanese; Triple-D's first Druze restaurant is thriving in New York City.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Texas meets Ethiopia at a Dallas-area joint with big-time brisket injera nachos; a Naples, Fla., spot has a gluten-free twist on beignets and an Atlanta chef is serving up carnitas and barbacoa.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digs into delicious dumplings and traditional beef noodle soup in Dallas; a funky spot in Naples, FL, embraces fare-like gator sausage and frog legs; a Chicago joint serves up lights-out mojo pork with plantains.

programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is paying homage to her mother's Irish roots by making healthier stuffed cabbage, an Irish pub salad and Irish soda bread with cheddar and chives; for dessert, Valerie makes sticky toffee pudding.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is celebrating a new book by making some of the recipes for two dear friends; she cooks sausage and peppers, a tuna egg salad melt and a delightful butter lettuce salad with zesty green goddess dressing.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking

programme.desc: A couple recently inherited a house that belonged to her parents, and they currently live in the home next door, so they need to decide which one they'll keep and renovate; there are strong feelings for both places.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A couple with an appreciation for character homes is looking for something unique with an outdoor kitchen and a pottery studio; Ben and Erin present a more traditional home set across from a park and a ranch-style house with a garden room.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A single mom, who grew up in New York, wants to give her two kids a cozy place, like the one she grew up in; Ben and Erin present a home with a huge fireplace, that instantly gives warmth, and a house on two acres that evokes childhood memories.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin help the City of Laurel and the Laurel Housing Authority to convert a historic building into Laurel's first Visitor's Center; they also take on the restoration of a 1940s public housing unit as part of the exhibit.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Newlyweds look to upgrade from their tiny house to an older home located on gifted family property; in a first for Ben and Erin, they decide to bulldoze the place and design a new build tailored to their eclectic, English apothecary style.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A couple lives in a house that once belonged to her grandmother, and with a large family that often visits, they're ready to make big upgrades; Ben and Erin add a much-needed additional bathroom as well as an outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A woman has completely turned her life around and looks to begin a new chapter with buying her first house; Ben and Erin create a home for her and her son with a big front porch and a laundry room, a luxury she's never had.

programme.title: Love It or List It UK
programme.desc: Frank and Wilma are at an impasse over their four-bed family home in Strathaven; now that their kids are flying the nest, Wilma has her sights set on the West Coast; Frank thinks they can still have many more happy years in the house.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young couple looks for a bigger house to grow their family near Mobile, Ala.; she's hoping for country charm they can move right into, but he's pushing for quirky details and some projects to make it their own.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A buyer outside St. Louis is ready to buy her first home; she's always wanted a place to make her own, so she's looking for a fixer-upper, but her mom, who's also representing her in the deal, is trying to talk her out of it.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Newlyweds look to buy their first home together but have diverging opinions about what they each want; he hopes to buy in the city of Dallas and likes houses with character and charm, while she dreams of a new build in a suburban community.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young couple looks to buy their first home together in Cincinnati; they're taking the next step in their relationship, and they're finding that they clash on everything from style to price and location.

programme.title: Garfield et cie

programme.title: L'agent Jean

programme.title: La minute de Mike!

programme.title: Paf le chien

programme.title: Paf le chien
programme.desc: En rentrant de l'école, Lola s'arrête pour acheter une barre de céréales; en sortant, elle est arrêtée et accusée de vol par le gérant; Paf va mener l'enquête pour innocenter sa maîtresse et découvrir qu'il s'agit d'un coup des Guanos.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: Lorsque les quatre dinos découvrent que l'étang dans le marais rétrécit, ils décident d'aider leur nouvel ami Léon à déménager sur le lac; Rocky mène la charge pour l'y amener.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Lorsque le roi Cochon décide de se débarrasser de son ours en peluche abîmé, il le regrette instantanément; il doit le récupérer à tout prix.

programme.title: Mini-Jean et Mini-Bulle

programme.title: La cuisine d'Isabelle et Ricardo
programme.desc: La cheffe Isabelle Deschamps Plante poursuit la mission de Ricardo ; elle reçoit dans la même cuisine pour y préparer des recettes simples, réconfortantes et accessibles, trois jours par semaine.

programme.title: 5 chefs dans ma cuisine
programme.desc: Privilégiant la cuisine de saison et les produits locaux, Josée Robitaille met en vedette des produits d'ici; à sa carte: des rillettes de saumon qui pourraient tout aussi bien être faites de morue et de moelleuses huîtres aux poireaux gratinées.

programme.title: Le téléjournal midi
programme.desc: Le point sur l'actualité avec les journalistes sur le terrain, au pays et ailleurs dans le monde.

programme.title: La facture
programme.desc: Faux sacs de luxe: des clientes prises pour des valises. Laissés en plan.

programme.title: Enquête
programme.desc: Magazine d'investigation qui expose des pratiques douteuses et révèle des faits méconnus ou cachés sur des questions préoccupantes d'intérêt public.

programme.title: Bardot
programme.desc: La jeune Brigitte n'a pas encore 15 ans lorsqu'elle pose pour la couverture du tout nouveau magazine ELLE; très vite repérée par Christian Vadim, Brigitte obtient la permission de sa famille de faire des essais pour un film.

programme.title: Les enquêtes de Dan Sommerdahl
programme.desc: Un père de famille est retrouvé mort au pied du complexe résidentiel du port; l'homme portait une combinaison de plongée lorsque quelqu'un l'a défenestré; les partenaires Dan et Flemming découvrent un conflit entre la victime et un autre résident.

programme.title: La semaine verte
programme.desc: Magazine d'actualité agroalimentaire et forestière qui aborde les enjeux environnementaux et les innovations en gestion des ressources renouvelables.

programme.title: Le téléjournal avec Claudine Bourbonnais
programme.desc: Un regard approfondi sur les sujets de l'heure, au pays comme à l'international, et sur les grands enjeux auxquels la société est confrontée.

programme.title: La petite vie
programme.desc: La correspondante française de Moman et son mari sont en visite au Québec.

programme.title: En direct de l'univers
programme.desc: Découvrez l'univers musical de Jean-Michel Blais.

programme.title: Professeur T
programme.desc: Depuis la mort de Lisa, Jasper est incapable de reprendre le travail tandis que Dan travaille plus dur que jamais, mais lorsqu'une femme disparaît d'un yacht, lui seul peut résoudre l'énigme.

programme.title: Joseph
programme.desc: Adèle, jeune cheffe en vogue, gagne une émission de cuisine et réalise enfin son rêve : ouvrir un restaurant. Mais son mentor, Jean-Philippe, refuse qu'elle parte et menace de révéler un secret destructeur.

programme.title: Le téléjournal avec Claudine Bourbonnais
programme.desc: Un regard approfondi sur les sujets de l'heure, au pays comme à l'international, et sur les grands enjeux auxquels la société est confrontée.

programme.title: Sports express
programme.desc: Nouvelles du sport en bref.

programme.title: Doc humanité
programme.desc: Renée Leblanc-Paulin a choisi de travailler le boeuf avec des carcasses locales entières. Autour d'elle, un réseau de femmes engagées l'aide à faire vivre un circuit aussi fragile que nécessaire.

programme.title: Fin de mi-temps pour le soldat Billy Lynn
programme.desc: En 2005, Billy Lynn, un jeune Texan de 19 ans, fait partie d'un régiment d'infanterie en Iraq et est victime d'une violente attaque. Ayant survécu à l'altercation, il est érigé en héros, ainsi que plusieurs de ses camarades.

programme.title: Adieu les cons
programme.desc: Lorsque Suze Trappet apprend à 43 ans qu'elle est sérieusement malade, elle décide de partir à la recherche de l'enfant qu'elle a été forcée d'abandonner quand elle avait 15 ans. Sa quête lui fait croiser JB, quinquagénaire en plein épuisement.

programme.title: Local Programming
programme.desc: Fin de la programmation.

programme.title: Les Woullis
programme.desc: Marco veut jouer avec Lila, mais elle est occupée avec un dessin secret. Chouchou se cache pour travailler sur son projet de tricot de noeud papillon super secret tandis que ses amis auraient souhaité qu'il se joigne à eux dans une quête.

programme.title: Lilou Bambou
programme.desc: Lilou Bambou fabrique un bricolage en forme de guitare quand elle se rend compte qu'à ses pieds se trouve un instrument qui lui ressemble: le ukulélé; fascinée, elle apprend à en jouer et profite pleinement des sons charmants de l'instrument.

programme.title: Léon
programme.desc: Léon et ses deux amis, Lola et un chat, partagent des aventures.

programme.title: 16 Hudson
programme.desc: Par peur que la pièce de théâtre ne soit un désastre, Lili fait une liste de tout ce qui pourrait mal se passer. Mais à force de chercher la perfection, elle finit par gâcher la répétition générale.

programme.title: Lili et Lola
programme.desc: Lili et Lola rendent visite à leur tante pour Norooz, et elles sont sur leur trente-et-un pour la photo de famille; Lola doit résister à l'idée de jouer dehors pour ne pas salir sa robe.

programme.title: Ollie et Moon
programme.desc: Lorsque Moon est prise dans une compétition pour faire une superbe vidéo, elle perd de vue ce qui est vraiment important.

programme.title: Léon
programme.desc: Léon et ses deux amis, Lola et un chat, partagent des aventures.

programme.title: Agent Binky: protecteur de l'univers
programme.desc: Les Protecteurs de l'Univers sont des animaux de compagnie courageux, mais aussi dotés d'une imagination débordante. Ils ont pour mission de protéger les humains d'invasions extraterrestres et de toute autre menace intergalactique.

programme.title: Tut Tut Cory Bolides
programme.desc: Cory met sur pied un plan d'apprentissage surpuissant pour Chrissy lorsqu'elle veut jouer une héroïne dans leur jeu de rôle; elle apprend même à construire des phrases.

programme.title: Tut Tut Cory Bolides
programme.desc: Cory et Freddie affrontent les frères Turbo dans une bataille épique de jeux vidéo: Tut tut danses de fêtes.

programme.title: Le village enchanté de Pinocchio
programme.desc: Geppetto refuse d'acheter à Pinocchio le jouet qui fait fureur au village: une poupée gnome que l'on envoie pour faire sursauter ses proches.

programme.title: Le village enchanté de Pinocchio
programme.desc: Pinocchio pense obtenir sans effort une bonne note en musique en utilisant une Flûte enchantée; sauf qu'il enchaîne les couacs, car la seule magie de la flûte est d'attirer à elle son possesseur.

programme.title: Contes chrono
programme.desc: Une petite fille va apprendre à obéir pour retrouver son chien qui s'est échappé.

programme.title: Mini-Jean et Mini-Bulle
programme.desc: J-C devient l'entraîneur de ping-pong de Mini-Bulle et interdit à Mini-Jean de jouer avec elle; pour récupérer son amie, Mini-Jean devra la battre au ping-pong.

programme.title: Arthur et les enfants de la table ronde
programme.desc: Sagremor, qui est toujours frigorifié, emprunte une paire de gants fourrés trouvés chez Merlin; les gants en question le rendent invisible, ainsi que tout ce qu'il touche, mais quand il veut les enlever, c'est impossible.

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja Challenge
programme.desc: Tetsuo doit sonner la cloche au sommet de la tour.

programme.title: Les bulles d'Angry Birds
programme.desc: Le groupe fait preuve d'endurance, de volonté et d'entêtement afin de mettre la main sur la récompense ultime.

programme.title: M. Magoo
programme.desc: Tandis que Magoo part à la chasse aux sorcières, Weasel reçoit la visite surprise de sa mère, une vieille réactionnaire acariâtre; la rencontre entre Fizz et Mme Weasel est, comme le redoutait Weasel, explosive.

programme.title: M. Magoo
programme.desc: En voulant faire des fouilles archéologiques, Magoo se retrouve dans le coffre-fort d'une banque; il y trouve le journal intime de Fizz et pense avoir fait une découverte historique qui doit être révélée au monde entier.

programme.title: Cirkus
programme.desc: Magique Maurice surprend tout le monde avec le Jour de la joie, un jour où il est interdit d'être de mauvaise humeur. Il abuse de son pouvoir. Elliot et Aria décident d'agir une fois pour toutes!

programme.title: Wowanimo
programme.desc: On présente l'unique et surprenant coyote.

programme.title: Massi en mission
programme.desc: Quelques questions sur le cyclisme.

programme.title: Savais-tu?
programme.desc: Les hiboux peuvent faire pivoter leur tête sur 270 degrés; leurs sens sont aussi très développés.

programme.title: Les joyeux patenteux
programme.desc: On transforme un tronc d'arbre en ensemble à pique-nique 100% bois, fourchettes et gobelets inclus! On apprend ensuite à préparer une boisson hydratante et à mêler un jeu de cartes comme des pros.

programme.title: Curium
programme.desc: Félix-Antoine souhaite en apprendre sur les cycles du sommeil chez les adolescents et sur les troubles du sommeil chez les animaux; il explore aussi l'univers des rêves lucides.

programme.title: Massi en mission
programme.desc: Quelques questions sur le softball, aussi appelé balle molle.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Bernard, l'ours polaire sans fourrure, quitte sa terre natale glacée pour voyager à travers le monde, faire du sport et vivre des aventures palpitantes.

programme.title: Les cochons d'Angry Birds
programme.desc: Un cochon tenace ne reculera devant rien pour devenir le prochain champion de la rampe.

programme.title: Organisation Super Insolite
programme.desc: Deux agents enfants, Olive et Otto, travaillent pour un organisme gouvernemental. Ils sont équipés des gadgets les plus avancés et les plus inimaginables.

programme.title: Savais-tu?
programme.desc: Le renard a la réputation d'être futé, surtout à cause de son apparence.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Le Roi Cochon se met à paniquer avant son dîner, car tous les cochons VIP qu'il a invités portent de magnifiques perruques, mais lui n'en a pas ; soudainement, un P'tit Bleu tombe sur la tête du Roi et celui-ci pense qu'il s'agit d'une perruque.

programme.title: MAJ
programme.desc: Estelle Fournier explique la science derrière les produits anti-âge; est-ce que tu t'es déjà laissé tenter par les promesses d'un produit antirides?

programme.title: Oniva!
programme.desc: Chaque semaine, on explore un nouveau thème par des jeux, des faits intéressants et des portraits sur des gens de partout au pays.

programme.title: Le jour du Seigneur
programme.desc: Des célébrations dominicales à l'Oratoire St-Joseph de Québec.

programme.title: Les coulisses du pouvoir
programme.desc: Incursion au coeur des débats politiques qui font l'actualité.

programme.title: Le téléjournal midi
programme.desc: Le point sur l'actualité avec les journalistes sur le terrain, au pays et ailleurs dans le monde.

programme.title: La semaine verte
programme.desc: Magazine d'actualité agroalimentaire et forestière qui aborde les enjeux environnementaux et les innovations en gestion des ressources renouvelables.

programme.title: L'épicerie
programme.desc: Magazine d'information sur les bonnes pratiques en matière d'alimentation ; analyses, bancs d'essai, tests de goût, découvertes culinaires.

programme.title: Une lueur d'espoir
programme.desc: Miep, une jeune secrétaire insouciante, accepte de cacher Otto Frank et sa famille des nazis.

programme.title: Les enquêtes de Vera
programme.desc: Vera Stanhope rouvre une vieille affaire après la découverte d'un squelette sur le site d'une boîte de nuit calcinée de Whitley Bay ayant appartenu au chef de la mafia locale; mais la mort d'un ouvrier sur le chantier vient compliquer son enquête.

programme.title: Zone économie
programme.desc: Quelles sont les nouveautés de l'année? Les crédits d'impôt à ne pas oublier? Plusieurs spécialistes vous éclairent et répondent à vos questions dans cette émission consacrée aux impôts.

programme.title: Le téléjournal avec Claudine Bourbonnais
programme.desc: Un regard approfondi sur les sujets de l'heure, au pays comme à l'international, et sur les grands enjeux auxquels la société est confrontée.

programme.title: Découverte

programme.title: Qu'est-ce qui se passe quand...?
programme.desc: Sébastien se demande comment vivre en forme plus de 100 ans et ce qui nous empêche de vivre encore plus vieux.

programme.title: Tout le monde en parle
programme.desc: Guy A. Lepage discute des sujets chauds qui font l'actualité.

programme.desc: Religious leader Gene Spriggs creates a movement in Tennessee with teenagers and disenchanted hippies called the Twelve Tribes; the Tribes become a cult with accusations of child abuse, forced labor and a devotion to what they claim is God's will.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Religious leader Gene Spriggs creates a movement in Tennessee with teenagers and disenchanted hippies called the Twelve Tribes; the Tribes become a cult with accusations of child abuse, forced labor and a devotion to what they claim is God's will.

programme.title: The Curious Case of...
programme.desc: Sheryl Ruthven, a self-proclaimed prophet, demands her followers revere cats as divine; her manipulation drives them into isolation, financial ruin, and bizarre rituals, tearing families apart and exploiting loyalty.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Police trace a trail of blood in an attempt to catch a cold and calculating killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered inside her home, and her family hopes to help put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: When a young woman turns up murdered, police desperately try to retrace her last known movements; however, what they discover reveals two shockingly different possibilities of how she was killed.

programme.title: Homicide: Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The key to solving homicides lies somewhere within the final 24 hours of the victim's life.

programme.title: Homicide: Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The story of a successful family caught up in lies and deception, which led to murder; a well-known Miami practice makes more enemies than the owners care to admit.

programme.title: Homicide: Hours to Kill
programme.desc: Andrew Kissel, a confessed fraudster, is found stabbed to death in the basement of his Connecticut home; detectives must unravel every detail from the previous 24 hours and, in doing so, come up with a long list of suspects.

programme.title: Homicide: Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The key to solving homicides lies somewhere within the final 24 hours of the victim's life.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A New Hampshire town reels after police arrest four teenagers for robbing and murdering a 42-year-old mother and maiming her 11-year-old daughter; detectives uncover two suspects with the characteristics of sadistic psychopaths.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A look inside the mind of psychopaths to discover when common pervasive traits deviate into violence, such as grandiosity, sadism, superficial charm, manipulation, lack of empathy and having a parasitic lifestyle.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A man calls 911 with his dying breath, and first responders arrive to find him brutally murdered and stabbed 59 times; when detectives question his best friend, they uncover a tangled story of deception and jealousy that ends in psychopathic rage.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: Behind a church lies a dismembered body burned beyond recognition; investigators identify the victim and receive a tip the suspect is female; a police interview reveals her as the most remorseless psychopathic killer they've ever seen.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A killer shoots a young woman dead in her boyfriend's Orlando, Fla., apartment; hours later, he turns up in a hospital bed 500 miles away with a gunshot wound and a bizarre story that unravels to reveal he's a lying, callous psychopath.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: When a priest from Florida goes missing, police focus on a troubled ex-convict whom he helped support; through multiple interrogations, a psychopathic killer reveals details of a twisted vengeance that escalates to a chilling murder.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A gunman shoots a man dead as he runs along a country road, and first responders find a witness standing next to the body with a strange story to tell; detectives unravel the lies of a callous psychopath who takes out his frustrations in bloodshed.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A mother who calls 911 to report her 32-year-old son is threatening her turns up dead in her home; he becomes the only suspect, and when he turns himself in, his pragmatic retelling of the slaying isn't just cold-hearted, it's psychopathic.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A woman finds her elderly brother dead in his bedroom with his throat slashed; uncovering the truth poses a challenge for detectives, as the individual responsible for killing him is a manipulative psychopath who craftily deflects blame.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: When being interviewed by police, psychopaths often use manipulation to thwart the investigation; experts explore the anatomy of the key manipulative tactics of psychopaths and how they try to utilize them for their own sinister gain.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: An early morning fire inside an apartment complex soon reveals something worse, the dead bodies of a young woman and an infant boy; detectives find a psychopath who appears polite and gentle, then later as a pawn of imagined demons.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: Police first arrest a man for discharging a firearm and soon discover dead bodies inside his apartment; detectives try to make sense of the bloody crime scene and a psychopath willing to murder those closest to him.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A family's dream home turns volatile when a gated road dispute sparks fear.

programme.title: Le Québec matin
programme.desc: On reste à l'affût de toute l'actualité sur des sujets tels que la politique, l'économie, la santé, la météo et la consommation grâce à des reporters en direct sur le terrain à Montréal, Québec, Sherbrooke, Trois-Rivières, Saguenay et Rimouski.

programme.title: Mario Dumont
programme.desc: Mario Dumont vulgarise l'actualité et la commente; émission axée sur la politique québécoise, canadienne et américaine, ainsi que l'économie.

programme.title: TVA nouvelles
programme.desc: Avec Philippe-Vincent Foisy, on reste au fait des nouvelles de dernière heure, des analyses, et la météo au bulletin d'information complet et préféré des Québécois.

programme.title: Le 14h
programme.desc: En semaine, Marie-Anne Lapierre vous informe et suit à la minute près les plus récentes nouvelles régionales, nationales et internationales.

programme.title: La joute
programme.desc: Débats, analyses et opinions sur la scène politique provinciale, fédérale, américaine et municipale, en compagnie de Paul Larocque et de ses collaborateurs de renom.

programme.title: Dans le blanc des yeux

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Les Simpson
programme.desc: Grand-père Simpson va mourir: ses deux reins ont éclaté à cause de Homer, qui n'a pas voulu s'arrêter sur la route, pour le laisser enfin uriner; Homer s'apprête à lui faire don d'un des siens, mais il prend peur.

programme.desc: Tommy poursuit sa nouvelle aventure; la visite de Rock chez ses prétendantes est un moment déstabilisant, dont les répercussions se feront sentir jusqu'à la journée de l'annonce finale; les couples s'envolent vers le Mexique.

programme.title: Vendre ou rénover au Québec

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A young artist with the ability to draw detailed pictures from memory may be the key to solving a case surrounding the suspicious death of his abusive father.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus and Will investigate a distressing call for help deep below the Bermuda Triangle resulting in a deadly battle to save Magnus's life.

programme.title: Clara
programme.desc: In a race to find intelligent life in the universe, an astronomer and his freethinking research assistant make an inexplicable discovery that changes how they see the world -- and each other.

programme.title: Ever After: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: Treated as a servant by her stepmother (Anjelica Huston), a 16th-century woman (Drew Barrymore) wins the heart of the French prince (Dougray Scott).

programme.title: Cairo Time
programme.desc: During a vacation in Egypt, an unexpected love affair arises between a magazine editor (Patricia Clarkson) and her husband's former colleague (Alexander Siddig).

programme.title: Snowtime!
programme.desc: Children (Angela Gallupo, Lucinda Davis, Sonja Ball) in a small village learn valuable life lessons when they form two teams for a massive snowball fight.

programme.title: The Maze Runner
programme.desc: A teen awakes within a massive maze with other teens, with no memory of his past other than dreams about an organization known as WCKD. He hopes to escape by piecing together fragments of his past and clues he discovers in the labyrinth.

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials
programme.desc: Thomas and his fellow teenage Gladers battle the powerful organization WCKD while facing the perils of the Scorch, a desolate landscape filled with dangerous obstacles and crawling with the virus-infected Cranks.

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
programme.desc: Thomas leads some escaped Gladers on their final and most dangerous mission yet. To save their friends, they must break into the legendary Last City, a WCKD-controlled labyrinth that may turn out to be the deadliest maze of all.

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: Though struggling with the ramifications of his extraordinary origin and abilities, young Clark Kent (Henry Cavill) must become a hero and save those he loves from a dire threat.

programme.title: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice
programme.desc: Convinced that Superman (Henry Cavill) is now a threat to humanity, Batman (Ben Affleck) embarks on a personal vendetta to end his reign on Earth, while the conniving Lex Luthor (Jesse Eisenberg) launches his own crusade against the Man of Steel.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Gypsy and Nick scheme to meet in person and hope to win Dee Dee's approval, but when their plan goes disastrously wrong they'll be pushed to make an extreme choice in order to be together.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: While Gypsy and Nick are on the run, flashbacks to a much younger Dee Dee reveal how trauma with her own mother set her up for conflict with Gypsy.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Dr Parnassus
programme.desc: After a carnival troupe saves his life, a man (Heath Ledger) agrees to help its immortal leader (Christopher Plummer) collect five souls and win a bet with the devil.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of an old college friend, Will finds himself caught in an underground fight club.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus and the Sanctuary team attempt to capture a rare and deadly creature while under the watchful eye of a local news crew.

programme.title: Goose!
programme.desc: A boy (Max Morrow) conspires to save a talking gander from a man (Chevy Chase) who plans to cook the bird in an upcoming culinary contest.

programme.title: My Little Pony: The Movie
programme.desc: Twilight Sparkle, Applejack, Rainbow Dash, Pinkie Pie, Fluttershy and Rarity embark on an epic journey to save Ponyville from a dark force.

programme.title: Curly Sue
programme.desc: A con man (James Belushi) targets a corporate lawyer (Kelly Lynch) and steals her heart with his adorable adopted daughter (Alisan Porter).

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: A lovable dog must rely on some new friends to help it break out of canine prison and get back home to his owners.

programme.title: The Games Maker
programme.desc: Ivan's love of board games transports him into the competitive world of game invention.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: The Curse of the Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Pest controllers Wallace (Peter Sallis) and Gromit must save the day when a vegetable-munching beast ravages town gardens.

programme.title: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Sent to bed without supper, a mischievous boy enters a land that grows out of his imagination and becomes king of the fantastic creatures who live there.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Teenage Sarah (Jennifer Connelly) journeys through a maze to recover her baby brother (Toby Froud) from a goblin king (David Bowie).

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Henry tackles a challenging assignment in his own way; Ellen learns some concerning information about the family into which she's expected to marry.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock develops superhuman strength and power when his body merges with the alien Venom. Twisted, dark and fueled by rage, Venom tries to control the new and dangerous abilities that Eddie finds so intoxicating.

programme.title: Don't You Forget About Me
programme.desc: Four filmmakers travel to Illinois to find filmmaker John Hughes.

programme.title: Polytechnique
programme.desc: A misogynist massacres female engineering students.

programme.title: Second Act
programme.desc: After losing a promotion to a college-educated candidate, a frustrated assistant manager sets out to prove to Madison Avenue that street smarts are as valuable as book smarts -- and it's never too late for a second act.

programme.title: Rebelle
programme.desc: African rebels force a village girl (Rachel Mwanza) to kill her own parents and join their army, but a miraculous event makes the rebels think she has supernatural powers.

programme.title: Maudie
programme.desc: From childhood to her deathbed, a woman experiences love, loss and discrimination.

programme.title: Dolphin Tale
programme.desc: A marine biologist (Harry Connick Jr.), a prosthetics designer (Morgan Freeman) and a boy band together to save the life of a dolphin whose tail was severely damaged in a trap.

programme.title: Rocky
programme.desc: Heavyweight champ Apollo Creed gives Philadelphia club fighter Rocky Balboa (Sylvester Stallone) a title shot.

programme.title: Rocky II
programme.desc: Underdog Philadelphia fighter Rocky Balboa (Sylvester Stallone) gets another shot at heavyweight champ Apollo Creed.

programme.title: Rocky III
programme.desc: Following his crushing defeat by Clubber Lang, Rocky Balboa joins forces with Apollo Creed in an effort to regain his title.

programme.title: Rocky IV
programme.desc: Heavyweight champion Rocky Balboa trains in Siberia for a match against the Soviet fighter who killed Apollo Creed. In front of a ferocious Russian crowd, he fights for one final showdown.

programme.title: Rocky V
programme.desc: Broke, punchy and at odds with his son, boxer Rocky (Sylvester Stallone) trains a hungry contender, then must street-fight him.

programme.title: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: Retired Rocky's (Sylvester Stallone) plan to re-enter the ring for a few small matches escalates into a full-fledged bout with the world's reigning heavyweight.

programme.title: Halloween Ends
programme.desc: Four years after her last encounter with Michael Myers, Laurie Strode finally decides to liberate herself and embrace life. However, a local murder unleashes a cascade of violence and terror, forcing her to confront the evil she can't control.

programme.title: The Strangers
programme.desc: Three masked assailants terrorize a young couple (Liv Tyler, Scott Speedman) in a romantic getaway to a remote cottage.

programme.title: Double Happiness
programme.desc: Pleasing her Chinese-Canadian father (Stephen Chang) means an aspiring actress (Sandra Oh) must sacrifice her own pursuits.

programme.title: The Sweet Hereafter
programme.desc: A lawyer (Ian Holm) seeks input from parents who lost children in a Canadian bus crash that claimed 14 lives.

programme.title: The Death and Life of John F. Donovan
programme.desc: A young actor reminisces about a dead American TV star and the correspondence they shared.

programme.title: Ballerina
programme.desc: A look at the Australian Ballet's first aboriginal dancer and her impact on the industry. Featuring interviews, dance sequences, and archive footage that showcases how Ella remains grounded in her own culture while performing.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: Daddy Warbucks (Albert Finney) protects little orphan Annie (Aileen Quinn) from Miss Hannigan (Carol Burnett) and crooks in Depression-era New York.

programme.title: The Wizard of Oz
programme.desc: After a tornado whisks Kansas farm girl Dorothy (Judy Garland) to a magic land, she must travel to the Emerald City for help in getting back home.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
programme.desc: A chosen hobbit (Elijah Wood) and his loyal friends join a wizard (Ian McKellen), humans, a dwarf and an elf on a quest to destroy a powerful ring and defeat an evil lord.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
programme.desc: Now divided, members of a fellowship take different paths to destroy the ring and defeat evil Sauron and his pawns.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
programme.desc: Frodo (Elijah Wood) and Sam march toward Mount Doom to destroy the ring, while Gandalf (Ian McKellen) and warriors prepare for a final confrontation with Sauron and his allies.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Henry tackles a challenging assignment in his own way; Ellen learns some concerning information about the family into which she's expected to marry.

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 1
programme.desc: After their car breaks down in an eerie small town, a young couple is forced to spend the night in a remote cabin. Panic ensues as they are terrorized by three masked strangers who strike with no mercy and seemingly no motive.

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 2
programme.desc: After learning that their victim, Maya, is still alive, three masked maniacs return to finish the job. With nowhere to run and no one to trust, Maya finds herself in a fight for survival against psychopaths who'll kill anyone who stands in their way.

programme.title: At First Light
programme.desc: A close encounter with mysterious lights sends two teens on the run after one discovers she has extraordinary but dangerous powers.

programme.title: Heavenly Bodies
programme.desc: Samantha quits her job to open an aerobics studio and competes with a larger club's lead instructor to become an aerobics instructor on a local fitness television show.

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: Blood begins to spill soon after the daughter (Allie MacDonald) of a Broadway diva wins the lead in the summer showcase at a performing-arts camp.

programme.title: Gem & Shaz
programme.desc: Two Asian Canadian teenage girls are given one hour at the school dance by their strict immigrant parents and are determined to make the most of it.

programme.desc: During a vacation in Egypt, an unexpected love affair arises between a magazine editor (Patricia Clarkson) and her husband's former colleague (Alexander Siddig).

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Stuart the mouse and Snowball the cat journey through New York City to rescue a friend from a falcon.
